response:
KEEP THE AREA CLEAN: BRUSH GENTLY AND THOROUGHLY AT LEAST TWICE A DAY WITH A SOFT-BRISTLED TOOTHBRUSH. AFTER EVERY MEAL, RINSE YOUR MOUTH WITH WATER TO REMOVE ANY FOOD PARTICLES THAT MIGHT GET LODGED IN THE CAVITY. USE TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS TO FILL THE VOID TEMPORARILY AND PROTECT THE TOOTH UNTIL YOU CAN SEE A DENTIST.  
*highlighted section*: BOX AND CAR ARE IMPORTANT TO MAINTAIN GOOD ORAL HYGIENE.  
*highlighted section*: TWO KEY MEASURES INCLUDE CLEANING AND FLOSSING.  
*highlighted section*: TRADITIONALLY, SALT WATER RINSES HELP REDUCE INFLAMMATION AND BACTERIA.
